title: Amazon Vendor Central API --> Monday.com Board
excerpt:
Has anyone successfully setup an API board from Amazon vendor central to automate a monday.com board? 
I am trying to pull in stock levels by the item sku number.  Which will allow me to than setup some notification rule…

posts.author: Nicktalbot (Nick Talbot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone successfully setup an API board from Amazon vendor central to automate a monday.com board?

I am trying to pull in stock levels by the item sku number. Which will allow me to than setup some notification rules in monday.com
